task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as Alice Johnson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user profile avatar, username 'alice.johnson', or the name 'Alice Johnson' in the top navigation bar or user menu of the web application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct work package in the E-Commerce Platform project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page displaying the work package titled 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' within the 'E-Commerce Platform' project context.

task_completion.description: Verify the work package status was changed to 'In progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status dropdown or field on the work package page showing the value 'In progress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the work package progress was updated to 20%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a '% Done', 'Progress', or similar field/slider on the work package page showing '20%'.

task_completion.description: Verify 4 hours of 'Development' time was logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Log time' form, modal, or logged time entry showing '4' (or 4.0) hours and the activity type set to 'Development'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required comment was added to the work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a comment box or an entry in the activity stream containing the text: 'Initial indexing structure created. Mapping configuration is pending review.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface (like Firefox or Chromium) interacting with the project management web application, not a terminal executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the forms and dropdowns.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing dropdown menus open, text being actively typed into input fields, or time-logging modals open, rather than just a final static page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates and text must be entered into the actual project management application's interface, not a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user login: 'alice.johnson'. Project: 'E-Commerce Platform' (identifier: ecommerce-platform). Work package subject: 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'. Expected status: 'In progress'. Expected progress: 20%. Expected logged time: 4.0 hours. Expected comment fragment: 'Initial indexing structure created'.
